name: @tootallnate/bmfont
description: Parser for AngelCode BMFont (.fnt) bitmap font descriptors. Decodes the binary BMF format used by many game engines (Cocos2d-x, Unity legacy, Unreal pre-Slate, MonoGame, Godot) into typed info / common / pages / chars / kerning records.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
